summary: Android Dokka GFM pilot complete. Built android-dokka-extractor.py, produced android-from-dokka.json (319 types, 3 interfaces, 1578 members), wrote 6-section comparison report. Swap recommended.

changes.change: NEW — reads Dokka GFM output from amity-sdk/build/dokka/gfm/; applies same perPackageOption suppress rules as dokkaHtml config; outputs android-from-dokka.json schema-compatible with android.json. Includes optional signature fields per member.
NEW — parallel Android surface from Dokka GFM. types=319, interfaces=3, members=1578, nested=519.
NEW — 6-section comparison. Key: 726 regex-only types are false positives (vendor code/suppressed packages); Dokka adds 2 new types + 177 members on shared types; swap recommended.
Added android-dokka-extractor to extractors table; updated running instructions; added Android migration section with key findings.

notes.dokka_invocation: dokkaJson task not wired in build.gradle (only dokkaHtml, dokkaGfm, dokkaJavadoc, dokkaJekyll registered). Used dokkaGfm instead. perPackageOption suppress rules in build.gradle only apply to dokkaHtml block — applied same suppressions manually in extractor.

regex_only_breakdown.suppressed_internal_amity: ~134 (dto, entity, infra, video impl, ekoapp legacy)

notes.swap_recommendation: YES — Dokka surface is strictly better. 726 regex false positives eliminated. 2 types + 177 members added. Follow-up task 0079 for swap; android-accuracy-validator.py may need allowlist/path-exclusion updates after swap.
